signals.headline: Both SOL and ETH Officially Classified as Commodities by US Regulators (March 2026) | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Both SOL and ETH Officially Classified as Commodities by US Regulators (March 2026) | YES | HIGH confidence**

US regulators officially classified both Solana and Ethereum as commodities in March 2026, eliminating major legal uncertainty that had weighed on allocator decisions[1]. Solana's spot ETF launched in October 2025, while Ethereum ETFs launched in 2024[1].

signals.headline: Ethereum Reclaims Transaction Activity Leadership with 41% Weekly Jump | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Reclaims Transaction Activity Leadership with 41% Weekly Jump | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ethereum's transactions jumped 41% over the past seven days, reclaiming activity leadership from Solana[1]. This surge was driven by renewed Layer 2 bridging activity from Base and Arbitrum's fee rebate programs, plus tokenized treasury issuance settling on Ethereum[1].
